summary: Testing iteration 14 - Verified TWO NEW FEATURES: 1) S.No column added to All Bills page showing daily_serial as first column, 2) Enhanced Feedbacks tab with date range filters (From/To) and asc/desc sort buttons by bill value.
passed_tests: All Bills Page: S.No column header exists as FIRST column
All Bills Page: Table headers order is [S.No, Bill #, Date, Customer, Phone, Executive, Items, Status, Subtotal, GST, Grand Total, Actions]
All Bills Page: S.No displays daily_serial value (e.g., '3', '2', '1') in gold color
All Bills Page: 15 bills loaded with S.No values
Reports Feedbacks Tab: Tab is visible and accessible
Reports Feedbacks Tab: 'From Date' input exists (data-testid='feedback-date-from')
Reports Feedbacks Tab: 'To Date' input exists (data-testid='feedback-date-to')
Reports Feedbacks Tab: 'High to Low' sort button exists (data-testid='sort-feedback-desc')
Reports Feedbacks Tab: 'Low to High' sort button exists (data-testid='sort-feedback-asc')
Reports Feedbacks Tab: Date filter input works - dates can be set
Reports Feedbacks Tab: 'Clear Dates' button appears when dates are set
Reports Feedbacks Tab: Clear Dates button resets date inputs
Reports Feedbacks Tab: 1 feedback displayed (Test Customer with 8/10 rating)
critical_code_review_comments: AllBillsPage.js: S.No header at line 120 with proper styling (w-[50px] text-center)
AllBillsPage.js: S.No cell at line 137 displays bill.daily_serial with fallback to '-'
Reports.js: Feedbacks tab at line 834-912 has From Date (line 846) and To Date (line 850) inputs
Reports.js: Sort buttons High to Low (line 854) and Low to High (line 855) with proper data-testids
Reports.js: IIFE pattern at line 868-907 applies both date filter AND value sort simultaneously

admin.method: Click 'Admin Login' link on login page

seed_data_creation: None - used existing data (15 bills, 1 feedback)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 verified both new features: 1) AllBillsPage.js S.No column shows daily_serial as first column with gold color, 2) Reports.js Feedbacks tab has date range filters (From/To) and asc/desc sort by bill value. The IIFE pattern filters and sorts simultaneously. OTP delivery remains MOCKED.

all_bills_sno_column.details: S.No column added as first column in All Bills table. Displays bill.daily_serial value. Falls back to '-' if null.

feedbacks_date_filter_and_sort.details: Feedbacks tab has From Date/To Date inputs and High to Low/Low to High sort buttons. Both work simultaneously via IIFE pattern.

screenshots_captured: .screenshots/all_bills_sno_column.png - All Bills page with S.No column as first column showing daily_serial values
.screenshots/feedbacks_tab_filters.png - Feedbacks tab with date inputs and sort buttons visible
.screenshots/feedbacks_filter_applied.png - Feedbacks tab after applying date filter with Clear Dates button visible

mocked_apis.OTP_delivery: OTP codes are shown on admin dashboard instead of being sent via email/SMS
